name: Orefinders Resources Inc.
description: Orefinders Resources Inc., now known as Orecap Invest Corp., is a Canadian-based junior resource company that transitioned from a gold exploration focus to a merchant banking model. Historically engaged in the exploration and development of mineral assets in Canada, such as the Mirado, McGarry, and Knight projects, the company now operates as a critical and precious metals-focused merchant bank. It specializes in acquiring assets, creating go-public events, and managing royalties, while providing shareholders with exposure to seed-round investments in high-quality resource companies and various co-investment opportunities within the mining sector.
